'''lapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hydromechanically|hydromechanically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hydromechanically|hydromechanically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lapate|lapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lapatesher|lapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapatesherĂ«m|lapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lapatero|lapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lapateshĂ«|lapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapateshĂ«m|lapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilapatero|gokilapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilapateshĂ«|gokilapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilapateshĂ«m|gokilapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golapankerom|golapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golapankeshĂ«|golapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golapankeshĂ«m|golapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golapankeya|golapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lapaterom|lapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapatemu|lapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lapateya|lapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilapaterom|gokilapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilapatemu|gokilapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilapateya|gokilapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lapapate|lapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lapapatesher|lapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapapatesherĂ«m|lapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lapapatero|lapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lapapateshĂ«|lapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapapateshĂ«m|lapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilapapatero|gokilapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilapapateshĂ«|gokilapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilapapateshĂ«m|gokilapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golapapankerom|golapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golapapankeshĂ«|golapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golapapankeshĂ«m|golapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golapapankeya|golapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lapapaterom|lapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lapapatemu|lapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lapapateya|lapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilapapaterom|gokilapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilapapatemu|gokilapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilapapateya|gokilapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠte|lĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠtesher|lĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠtero|lĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠpĂŠtero|gokilĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠpĂŠnkerom|golĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠpĂŠnkeya|golĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠterom|lĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠtemu|lĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠpĂŠteya|lĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠpĂŠterom|gokilĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠpĂŠteya|gokilĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafpafte|lafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafpaftesher|lafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafpaftesherĂ«m|lafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafpaftero|lafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafpafteshĂ«|lafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafpafteshĂ«m|lafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafpaftero|gokilafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafpafteshĂ«|gokilafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafpafteshĂ«m|gokilafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafpafnkerom|golafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafpafnkeshĂ«|golafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafpafnkeshĂ«m|golafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafpafnkeya|golafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafpafterom|lafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafpaftemu|lafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafpafteya|lafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafpafterom|gokilafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafpaftemu|gokilafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafpafteya|gokilafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
